name: Frostfall Sickle
desc2: Equip to increase Anomaly Agents' combat capabilities
phaseDescs: When an <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice attribute</ct> equipper uses a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct> is increased by <ct color=#2BAD00>20%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times, once per use of a skill. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>35%</ct>.

When an <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice attribute</ct> equipper uses a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct> is increased by <ct color=#2BAD00>23%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times, once per use of a skill. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>38.5%</ct>.

When an <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice attribute</ct> equipper uses a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct> is increased by <ct color=#2BAD00>26%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times, once per use of a skill. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>42%</ct>.

Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>45.5%</ct>.

When an <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice attribute</ct> equipper uses a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct> is increased by <ct color=#2BAD00>32%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times, once per use of a skill. Repeated triggers refresh the duration. At 2 stacks, the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG dealt is increased by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>50%</ct>.
